active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: Promotion gate bundle for phase-8: current state is EXECUTE, phase-8 is in progress, stale legacy phase-8 artifacts must not be used, and the fresh evidence is the 20260522T151605Z parallel 50-case LongMemEval/LoCoMo full-chain v3 eval pair plus focused/full verification.

phase_objective: Produce a source-grounded promotion or next-blueprint decision from fresh phase-8 full verification and case-level benchmark evidence.
stale_artifacts: work/phase-8/research.md predates this context bundle and reflects a legacy default/deprecation task.
work/phase-8/reviews/codex-review.md predates this context bundle and cannot support the current promotion gate.
red_evidence_required_before_implementat: Phase 8 is decision-only by default; the RED condition is the absence of fresh phase-8 50-case full-chain evidence and stale phase-8 artifacts that do not cite context_bundle.md.
If a production code change becomes necessary, add a focused failing test before implementation and record the failing command in result.md.

verification_commands.parallel_eval_longmemeval: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 50 --run-id phase8_lme50_<timestamp>
verification_commands.parallel_eval_locomo: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 50 --run-id phase8_locomo50_<timestamp>

usable_ack_checklist: active goal is referenced in result.md, review_verdict.json, ack.json, and promotion_decision.md
work/phase-8/context_bundle.md is cited by plan, execute, and review outputs
fresh phase-8 pytest and ruff output is recorded
LongMemEval and LoCoMo milestone evals are run in parallel or the blocker is recorded
case-level analysis includes fail-to-pass, pass-to-fail, unchanged fail, retrieval miss, evidence-hit-answer-fail, unsupported answer, and judge questionable groups
source grounding movement is separated from aggregate pass rate
kernel default remains unchanged and promotion evals do not set MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1
decision is one of continue_targeted, expand_eval, hold, or promote_blueprint and is justified by case-level evidence
review_focus: LoCoMo-specific misses and whether they remain unexplained
whether deterministic fallback evidence is incorrectly treated as a milestone gate
whether aggregate score is used without case-level movement

decision_policy.continue_targeted: Choose when a specific bottleneck remains visible and needs a new targeted blueprint.
decision_policy.expand_eval: Choose only if 50-case evidence is stable across both benchmarks with no hidden grounding regression.
decision_policy.hold: Choose when pass rate moved but evidence quality or judge stability regressed.
decision_policy.promote_blueprint: Choose when the active blueprint/state should be updated for the next loop with a documented amendment.
